bugs.title: role value 'route_definition' in graph-synthesizer.md is absent from NodeRole union in graph-schema.ts
bugs.evidence: graph-synthesizer.md defines 'route_definition' as a valid role value in its decision heuristics and output schema specification. However, graph-schema.ts NodeRole union type only includes: entry_point, core_module, utility, config, middleware, model, public_api, internal. The value 'route_definition' is not present.
bugs.expected: Every role value emitted by the synthesizer agent must be a member of the NodeRole union in graph-schema.ts. All 9 role values should be consistently defined across both files.
bugs.suggested_fix: Add 'route_definition' to the NodeRole union type in plugins/code-atlas/src/types/graph-schema.ts. This is the semantic role for route/router definition files (API endpoints, route handlers). Update the NodeRole union type from: 'entry_point' | 'core_module' | 'utility' | 'config' | 'middleware' | 'model' | 'public_api' | 'internal' to: 'entry_point' | 'core_module' | 'utility' | 'config' | 'middleware' | 'model' | 'public_api' | 'route_definition' | 'internal'

summary: All 6 Wave 1 agents completed and verified. Files created: graph-schema.ts, query-operations.ts, index.ts, graph-synthesizer.md, query-language-reference.md, graph-schema-example.json, plus updates to plugin.json and map skill documentation. One P2 cross-agent schema inconsistency found: NodeRole union missing 'route_definition' value used by synthesizer agent.
